description: Composition Black football shorts for men made of 100% polyester, has an elasticated waistband with a drawstring, grey panelling on the sides and swoosh logo embroidered towards the left hemline Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash cold with like colours Do not bleach, iron or dry clean Line dry Built with the breathability and zero-distraction fit that athletes demand, this pair of nike running shorts comes in a simple design. Team it with tees and running shoes.
